zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Cate於1526年出生在英國英格蘭戴文可利頓時，他的父親Robert Lawrence De Catte18歲，母親Joan Clark23歲。他於1551年5月11日與Margaret Bagwell在英國英格蘭戴文可利頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1596年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特享年70歲。

nameMeanings.name: Cate
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: habitational name from any of several small farms in the East Netherlands known as Ten Cate, from katerstede ‘small cottage for a peasant or a laborer’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Cate was born in 1526, in Colyton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Lawrence De Catte, was 18 and his mother, Joan Clark, was 23. He married Margaret Bagwell on 11 May 1551, in Colyton, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1596, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Cate est né en 1526, à Colyton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Lawrence De Catte, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Joan Clark, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Bagwell le 11 mai 1551, à Colyton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1596, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Cate(이)가 1526년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 코리턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Lawrence De Catte(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Clark(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1551년 5월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 코리턴에서 Margaret Bagwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1596년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Margaret Bagwell em 11 de maio de 1551, em Colyton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1596, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Cate родился в 1526 г. в местности колитон, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Lawrence De Catte было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Clark, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Bagwell 11 мая 1551 г. в местности колитон, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1596 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет.
